nasb.text: but I have chosen Jerusalem that My name might be there, and I have chosen David to be over My people Israel.’

esv.text: but I have chosen Jerusalem that my name may be there, and I have chosen David to be over my people Israel.’

cnv.text: 我卻揀選了耶路撒冷，使我的名留在那裡；也揀選了大衛，統治我的子民以色列。’

ccb.text: 但如今，我拣选了耶路撒冷作为我名所在之地，又拣选了大卫来治理我的以色列子民。’”
